headline: Is Stanley Black & Decker (SWK) Still Out Of Favor After Its Recent Share Price Rebound
summary: If you are wondering whether Stanley Black & Decker stock offers fair value at its current price, or if the tools giant is still out of favor, this breakdown aims to help you frame that question clearly. The stock last closed at US$75.14, with returns that include an 11.8% gain over the past 30 days, a 10.2% gain over the past year and a decline of 57.5% over five years.
